revision.comment: Auto-generated page
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:WorldCat/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: /* See also */ [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2023 May 10#Template:WorldCat author]] + [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2023 May 2#Template:WorldCat subject]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template can make an [[Wikipedia:External links|external link]] to: * A library holding: An item (book, CD, video, journal, etc.) catalogued in the inventories of various libraries. * A bibliography: A list of works by or about a subject (i.e., works associated with a particular [[subject heading]]). Library holdings are tracked by [[WorldCat]], a [[union catalog]] that itemizes the collections of 72,000 libraries in 170 countries and territories. Bibliographies were available at ''WorldCat Identities'', a project ceased to exist. WorldCat's new [[authority file]] is called ''[[WorldCat Entities]]''. Sample output: {{WorldCat|id=lccn-n79100628 |name=Murasaki Shikibu}} ==Usage== ===For works=== {{tlx|WorldCat|oclc{{=}}|name{{=}}}} * {{para|oclc}} is an [[Online Computer Library Center]] [[Accession number (library science)|accession number]], which has 1 to 9 digits. * {{para|name}} is optional: it overrides the default link label, which is the [[Wikipedia:Page name|page name]] ===For people and subjects=== {{tlx|WorldCat|id{{=}}|name{{=}}}} * {{para|id}} is a [[Library of Congress Control Number]] with the format {{var|lccn-n00-00000}}. * {{para|name}} is optional: it overrides the default link label, which is the [[Wikipedia:Page name|page name]]. ==Instructions== ===To link to a library item=== # Search [https://www.worldcat.org/ WorldCat] for any other work or service that a library might stock or subscribe to. You can search by title, author, keyword, subject, ISBN, or ISSN. (See the [https://www.worldcat.org/advancedsearch Advanced Search] page for all options.) # Go to the page of the work, edition, and format that you want. # Copy the number after ''oclc/'' in the [[address bar]] of your web browser: {{nowrap|https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/{{highlight|17522144}}}} # Add the template to the "External links" section of the article. # Add the OCLC number and (optionally) a name to the template. (The default name is the [[Wikipedia:Page name|page name]].) You can refine your WorldCat search using the filters. WorldCat includes (but is not limited to): articles, audiobooks, books, e-books, computer files, journals, magazines, maps, movies (BD, DVD, VHS, et al.), music recordings (CD, LP, cassette, et al.), musical scores, newspapers, rare works, theses, TV shows, video games, videos, web services. Example: {{tlx|WorldCat|oclc{{=}}17522144|name{{=}}''The Tale of Genji'' (Edward Seidensticker translation)}} Result: * {{WorldCat|oclc=17522144 |name=''The Tale of Genji'' (Edward Seidensticker translation)}} ===To link to a bibliography for a person or other subject=== # Search [https://www.worldcat.org/identities/ WorldCat Identities] for the subject. # Click the name or subject from the list of search results. # Copy the {{var|lccn}} string from the [[address bar]] of your web browser: {{nowrap|https://worldcat.org/identities/{{highlight|lccn-n79100628}}/}} # Add the template to the "External links" section of the article. # Add the {{var|lccn}} string and, optionally, a name to the template. (The default name is the [[Wikipedia:Page name|page name]].) Example: {{tlx|WorldCat|id{{=}}lccn-n79100628|name{{=}}Murasaki Shikibu}} Result: * {{WorldCat|id=lccn-n79100628 |name=Murasaki Shikibu}} ==Maintenance categories== * {{clc|Pages using WorldCat with unknown parameters}} == See also == {{Wikidata property|P7859|P243|P5331}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Author and writer external link templates]] [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:WorldCat/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:WorldCat/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:WorldCat/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:WorldCat/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: /* See also */ other templates that link to WorldCat
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
